title: SAVOURY BUCKWHEAT PORRIDGE
description: Savoury buckwheat porridge is a warm, nourishing dish made with soft-cooked buckwheat, sauteed onions, garlic, and a touch of olive oil.
benefits: Rich in nutrients and naturally gluten-free
High in plant-based protein and fiber
Made with simple, clean, and wholesome ingredients
Easily customizable with vegetables and proteins
steps: Rinse the buckwheat thoroughly under running water and drain well.
Heat olive oil in a pan, add onions and garlic, sauté until soft.
Add buckwheat and roast for 2–3 minutes.
Pour water or broth, add salt and pepper, simmer until soft.
Add vegetables if needed and cook a few minutes more. Serve warm.

title: BUCKWHEAT CHILLA
description: Buckwheat chilla is a savory, protein-rich pancake made with buckwheat flour, finely chopped onions, fresh herbs, and mild spices.
benefits: Rich in plant-based protein and fiber
Naturally gluten-free and easy to digest
steps: Mix buckwheat flour with chopped vegetables and spices.
Add water and make smooth batter.
Heat a pan and grease lightly.
Pour batter and spread like pancake.
Cook both sides until golden and crisp.

title: BUCKWHEAT PANCAKES
description: Buckwheat pancakes are soft, wholesome pancakes made from buckwheat flour batter.
steps: Mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add milk, egg, banana, and mix well.
Heat pan and grease with butter.
Pour batter and cook until bubbles form.
Flip and cook until golden brown.

title: BUCKWHEAT GRANOLA MIX
description: Buckwheat granola mix is a crunchy blend of roasted buckwheat, nuts, and seeds.
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Mix all dry ingredients.
Add honey and oil, mix well.
Spread on tray and bake 20–25 mins.
Cool and store in airtight container.

title: BUCKWHEAT PILAF
description: A wholesome and nutritious lunch dish made with roasted buckwheat, fresh vegetables, and mild seasonings. Light yet satisfying and full of flavor.
benefits: Rich in fiber and supports digestion
steps: Rinse buckwheat thoroughly.
Heat oil and sauté onion and garlic.
Add vegetables and cook slightly.
Add buckwheat and broth, season well.
Cook until soft and fluffy. Serve warm.

title: BUCKWHEAT CHICKEN ONE-POT
description: A protein-rich meal made with buckwheat, tender chicken, and vegetables cooked together in one pot.
steps: Cut chicken and season.
Sauté onion, garlic in oil.
Add chicken and cook lightly.
Add vegetables and buckwheat.
Pour broth and cook until done.

title: BUCKWHEAT VEGETABLE PULAO
description: A healthy and flavorful dish made with buckwheat, vegetables, and mild spices. Light and filling.
steps: Rinse buckwheat.
Heat oil, sauté cumin, onion, garlic.
Add vegetables and cook slightly.
Add buckwheat and water.
Cook until soft and garnish.

title: BUCKWHEAT LENTIL BOWL
description: A nutritious bowl with buckwheat, lentils, and vegetables. Rich in fiber and plant-based protein.
steps: Cook buckwheat and lentils separately.
Sauté vegetables in oil.
Mix everything together.
Season well and add lemon juice.
Serve warm or as bowl meal.
